name: Kwan Phayao water-body west envelope
reason: Bounding-box exclusion for the broad western body of Kwan Phayao; prevents coarse-resolution heat cells from spilling into open water.

name: Kwan Phayao northwest open-water envelope
reason: Expanded northwest open-water exclusion after field review identified remaining heat cells around 19.1987, 99.8601.

name: Kwan Phayao mid-west open-water envelope
reason: Expanded mid-west open-water exclusion after field review identified remaining heat cells around 19.1728, 99.8556.

name: Kwan Phayao southwest open-water envelope
reason: Expanded southwest open-water exclusion after field review identified remaining heat cells around 19.1508, 99.8696.

name: Kwan Phayao far-west open-water envelope
reason: Expanded western open-water exclusion after field review identified remaining heat cells around 19.1637, 99.8834.

name: Kwan Phayao water-body east envelope
reason: Bounding-box exclusion for the broad eastern body of Kwan Phayao; complements circular exclusions to suppress open-water heat cells.

name: Kwan Phayao open-water north
reason: Open-water surface where fixed public EV charging demand is impossible; exclude heat-map points in the northern lake body.

name: Kwan Phayao open-water central
reason: Open-water surface where fixed public EV charging demand is impossible; exclude heat-map points in the central lake body.

name: Kwan Phayao open-water south
reason: Open-water surface where fixed public EV charging demand is impossible; exclude heat-map points in the southern lake body.
